PyCon 2025

The Premier Python Conference

Annual Python conference bringing together developers, data scientists, and enthusiasts for talks, workshops, and networking.

About PyCon 2025

Join the global Python community for three days of inspiring talks, hands-on workshops, and meaningful connections.

🎤 Keynote Speakers

Learn from industry leaders and open-source pioneers sharing insights on the latest Python trends and best practices.

🛠️ Hands-On Workshops

Participate in interactive workshops covering web development, data science, machine learning, and more.

🤝 Networking

Connect with thousands of Python developers, share ideas, and build lasting professional relationships.

💡 Innovation Showcase

Discover cutting-edge projects and tools from the Python ecosystem and emerging startups.

🎓 Learning Tracks

Choose from multiple tracks tailored to your experience level, from beginner to advanced topics.

🌍 Global Community

Be part of a diverse, inclusive community celebrating Python and its impact worldwide.

Conference Schedule

Day 1: May 16
9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

Opening Keynote & Talks

Welcome address followed by inspiring talks from industry leaders on Python's future.

Day 2: May 17
9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

Workshops & Deep Dives

Hands-on workshops and technical deep dives into specialized Python topics and frameworks.

Day 3: May 18
9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

Lightning Talks & Closing

Community lightning talks, innovation showcase, and closing ceremony with networking reception.

Venue & Location

Conference Details

Location: Convention Center, Downtown

Dates: May 16-18, 2025

Time: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Daily)

Capacity: 2,000+ attendees

The venue is easily accessible by public transportation and offers ample parking. Complimentary breakfast, lunch, and refreshments will be provided throughout the conference.

Accessibility accommodations are available. Please contact us for specific needs.

📍 Interactive Map

Map integration coming soon

Ready to Join?

Secure your spot at PyCon 2025 and be part of the world's premier Python conference.

Early bird tickets available until April 30, 2025

About PyCon 2025

The premier annual conference for the Python community, bringing together developers, data scientists, and enthusiasts worldwide.
